title: Structured output via tool-use enforcement for monitor classify
body: Monitor classify calls relied on prompt instructions ('respond with JSON only') and text parsing (JSON.parse on free-form LLM response). The model could ignore the instruction and produce prose preambles, reasoning text, or malformed output — causing classify failures. Fixed in classifyViaAgent() by defining VERDICT_TOOL with TypeBox parameters, passing it in Context.tools, and setting toolChoice to force the tool call. The model produces ToolCall.arguments matching the schema — no free-form text, no JSON.parse() of LLM output. Scoped to monitors (direct complete() calls). Workflow agent steps use subprocess dispatch via pi --mode json where tool-use enforcement would require pi-coding-agent core changes — that remains a separate concern.
resolved_by: VERDICT_TOOL + toolChoice enforcement in classifyViaAgent(), ToolCall extraction replaces extractResponseText() + JSON.parse() + parseVerdict() fallback
